title: Hotbar Scrolling RPG
description: Stops hotbar scrolling at the first and last slots for precise control
body:

## **Hotbar Scrolling RPG**

[![PayPal](https://img.shields.io/badge/PayPal-sparkitv-blue?logo=paypal&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.paypal.me/sparkitv)
[![Join our Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/eH38TdA)

---

No more endless scrolling!  
This simple Fabric mod prevents you from using your mouse wheel to scroll past the first and last slots of your hotbar.  
Your hotbar now stops precisely at **Slot 1** and **Slot 9**, without looping through.

---
